# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

@Library('shared-library') _
import groovy.json.JsonSlurper
import java.security.MessageDigest
import java.net.URL
import java.nio.file.Files
import java.nio.file.Paths

def ALLOWED_DOMAINS = [
    's3.amazonaws.com',
    's3-us-west-2.amazonaws.com',
    's3.eu-west-1.amazonaws.com',
    'artifactory.company.com',
    'nexus.company.com',
    'releases.company.com'
]

def ALLOWED_PROTOCOLS = ['https']
def MAX_ARTIFACT_SIZE = 500 * 1024 * 1024 // 500MB
def DOWNLOAD_TIMEOUT = 300 // 5 minutes

pipeline {
    agent { label 'deployment-agent' }
    
    parameters {
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_URL',
            description: 'URL of the artifact to download (must be from approved sources)',
            defaultValue: ''
        )
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM',
            description: 'SHA256 checksum of the artifact for verification',
            defaultValue: ''
        )
        choice(
            name: 'ENVIRONMENT',
            choices: ['staging', 'production'],
            description: 'Target deployment environment'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS',
            description: 'Comma-separated list of server IPs/hostnames',
            defaultValue: ''
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOYMENT_PATH',
            description: 'Target path on deployment servers',
            defaultValue: '/opt/application'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'BACKUP_EXISTING',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Backup existing artifacts before deployment'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'VERIFY_SIGNATURE',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Verify artifact signature if available'
        )
        string(
            name: 'SIGNATURE_URL',
            description: 'URL of the artifact signature file (.sig)',
            defaultValue: ''
        )
    }
    
    options {
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '30'))
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
        timeout(time: 1, unit: 'HOURS')
        timestamps()
    }
    
    environment {
        ARTIFACT_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/artifacts"
        DEPLOYMENT_USER = credentials('deployment-ssh-user')
        GPG_KEY_ID = credentials('artifact-signing-key-id')
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Validating Input Parameters ==="
                    
                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URL?.trim()) {
                        error("ARTIFACT_URL parameter is required")
                    }
                    
                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM?.trim()) {
                        error("ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM parameter is required for security verification")
                    }
                    
                    if (!params.DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS?.trim()) {
                        error("DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS parameter is required")
                    }
                    
                    validateURL(params.ARTIFACT_URL)
                    
                    if (params.VERIFY_SIGNATURE && params.SIGNATURE_URL?.trim()) {
                        validateURL(params.SIGNATURE_URL)
                    }
                    
                    validateChecksum(params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM)
                    
                    validateDeploymentPath(params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH)
                    
                    if (params.ENVIRONMENT == 'production') {
                        echo "WARNING: Deploying to PRODUCTION environment"
                        timeout(time: 5, unit: 'MINUTES') {
                            input message: 'Approve production deployment?', 
                                  ok: 'Deploy to Production',
                                  submitter: 'deployment-approvers'
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Prepare Environment') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Preparing Deployment Environment ==="
                    
                    sh """
                        rm -rf ${ARTIFACT_DIR}
                        mkdir -p ${ARTIFACT_DIR}
                        chmod 700 ${ARTIFACT_DIR}
                    """
                    
                    if (params.VERIFY_SIGNATURE) {
                        sh """
                            gpg --list-keys ${GPG_KEY_ID} || \
                            gpg --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys ${GPG_KEY_ID}
                        """
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Downloading Artifact ==="
                    
                    def artifactUrl = sanitizeURL(params.ARTIFACT_URL)
                    def artifactFile = "${ARTIFACT_DIR}/artifact"
                    
                    downloadArtifact(artifactUrl, artifactFile)
                    
                    def fileSize = sh(
                        script: "stat -f%z '${artifactFile}' 2>/dev/null || stat -c%s '${artifactFile}'",
                        returnStdout: true
                    ).trim().toLong()
                    
                    if (fileSize > MAX_ARTIFACT_SIZE) {
                        error("Artifact size ${fileSize} bytes exceeds maximum allowed size ${MAX_ARTIFACT_SIZE} bytes")
                    }
                    
                    echo "Downloaded artifact size: ${fileSize} bytes"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Verify Checksum') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Verifying Artifact Checksum ==="
                    
                    def artifactFile = "${ARTIFACT_DIR}/artifact"
                    def actualChecksum = calculateSHA256(artifactFile)
                    def expectedChecksum = params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM.toLowerCase().trim()
                    
                    echo "Expected checksum: ${expectedChecksum}"
                    echo "Actual checksum:   ${actualChecksum}"
                    
                    if (actualChecksum != expectedChecksum) {
                        error("Checksum verification failed! Artifact may be corrupted or tampered with.")
                    }
                    
                    echo "✓ Checksum verification passed"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Verify Signature') {
            when {
                expression { params.VERIFY_SIGNATURE && params.SIGNATURE_URL?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Verifying Artifact Signature ==="
                    
                    def signatureUrl = sanitizeURL(params.SIGNATURE_URL)
                    def signatureFile = "${ARTIFACT_DIR}/artifact.sig"
                    
                    downloadArtifact(signatureUrl, signatureFile)
                    
                    def verifyResult = sh(
                        script: """
                            gpg --verify '${signatureFile}' '${ARTIFACT_DIR}/artifact' 2>&1
                        """,
                        returnStatus: true
                    )
                    
                    if (verifyResult != 0) {
                        error("GPG signature verification failed!")
                    }
                    
                    echo "✓ Signature verification passed"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Scan Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Scanning Artifact for Security Issues ==="
                    
                    def artifactFile = "${ARTIFACT_DIR}/artifact"
                    
                    def fileType = sh(
                        script: "file -b '${artifactFile}'",
                        returnStdout: true
                    ).trim()
                    
                    echo "Artifact type: ${fileType}"
                    
                    if (fileType.contains('executable') || fileType.contains('script')) {
                        echo "WARNING: Artifact appears to be executable"
                    }
                    
                    def scanResult = sh(
                        script: """
                            if command -v clamscan &> /dev/null; then
                                clamscan --no-summary '${artifactFile}'
                            else
                                echo "ClamAV not available, skipping virus scan"
                            fi
                        """,
                        returnStatus: true
                    )
                    
                    if (scanResult != 0 && scanResult != 127) {
                        error("Security scan detected potential threats in artifact")
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Prepare Deployment Package') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Preparing Deployment Package ==="
                    
                    def artifactFile = "${ARTIFACT_DIR}/artifact"
                    def fileType = sh(
                        script: "file -b --mime-type '${artifactFile}'",
                        returnStdout: true
                    ).trim()
                    
                    if (fileType.contains('zip') || fileType.contains('compressed')) {
                        sh """
                            cd ${ARTIFACT_DIR}
                            mkdir -p extracted
                            unzip -q artifact -d extracted/ || tar -xzf artifact -C extracted/ || tar -xjf artifact -C extracted/
                        """
                        env.DEPLOYMENT_SOURCE = "${ARTIFACT_DIR}/extracted"
                    } else {
                        env.DEPLOYMENT_SOURCE = artifactFile
                    }
                    
                    sh """
                        find ${ARTIFACT_DIR} -type f -name '*.sh' -exec chmod +x {} \\;
                    """
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy to Servers') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Deploying to ${params.ENVIRONMENT} Servers ==="
                    
                    def servers = params.DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    def deploymentPath = sanitizePath(params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH)
                    
                    servers.each { server ->
                        validateServerAddress(server)
                    }
                    
                    def deploymentSteps = [:]
                    
                    servers.each { server ->
                        deploymentSteps[server] = {
                            deployToServer(server, deploymentPath)
                        }
                    }
                    
                    parallel deploymentSteps
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Verify Deployment') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Verifying Deployment ==="
                    
                    def servers = params.DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    def deploymentPath = sanitizePath(params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH)
                    
                    def verificationSteps = [:]
                    
                    servers.each { server ->
                        verificationSteps[server] = {
                            verifyDeployment(server, deploymentPath)
                        }
                    }
                    
                    parallel verificationSteps
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Health Check') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Performing Health Checks ==="
                    
                    def servers = params.DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    
                    sleep(time: 10, unit: 'SECONDS')
                    
                    servers.each { server ->
                        performHealthCheck(server)
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        success {
            script {
                echo "=== Deployment Successful ==="
                emailext(
                    subject: "✓ Deployment Successful: ${env.JOB_NAME} #${env.BUILD_NUMBER}",
                    body: """
                        Deployment completed successfully.
                        
                        Environment: ${params.ENVIRONMENT}
                        Artifact: ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}
                        Servers: ${params.DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS}
                        
                        Build URL: ${env.BUILD_URL}
                    """,
                    to: '${DEFAULT_RECIPIENTS}',
                    mimeType: 'text/plain'
                )
            }
        }
        failure {
            script {
                echo "=== Deployment Failed ==="
                emailext(
                    subject: "✗ Deployment Failed: ${env.JOB_NAME} #${env.BUILD_NUMBER}",
                    body: """
                        Deployment failed.
                        
                        Environment: ${params.ENVIRONMENT}
                        Artifact: ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}
                        
                        Build URL: ${env.BUILD_URL}
                        
                        Please check the logs for details.
                    """,
                    to: '${DEFAULT_RECIPIENTS}',
                    mimeType: 'text/plain'
                )
            }
        }
        always {
            script {
                sh """
                    rm -rf ${ARTIFACT_DIR}
                """
            }
            cleanWs()
        }
    }
}

def validateURL(String url) {
    if (!url?.trim()) {
        error("URL cannot be empty")
    }
    
    try {
        def urlObj = new URL(url)
        def protocol = urlObj.getProtocol()
        def host = urlObj.getHost()
        
        if (!ALLOWED_PROTOCOLS.contains(protocol)) {
            error("Protocol '${protocol}' is not allowed. Only ${ALLOWED_PROTOCOLS} are permitted.")
        }
        
        def domainAllowed = ALLOWED_DOMAINS.any { allowedDomain ->
            host == allowedDomain || host.endsWith(".${allowedDomain}")
        }
        
        if (!domainAllowed) {
            error("Domain '${host}' is not in the allowed list: ${ALLOWED_DOMAINS}")
        }
        
        if (url.contains('..') || url.contains('//')) {
            error("URL contains potentially malicious patterns")
        }
        
    } catch (Exception e) {
        error("Invalid URL format: ${e.message}")
    }
}

def validateChecksum(String checksum) {
    if (!checksum?.trim()) {
        error("Checksum cannot be empty")
    }
    
    if (!checksum.matches(/^[a-fA-F0-9]{64}$/)) {
        error("Invalid SHA256 checksum format. Expected 64 hexadecimal characters.")
    }
}

def validateDeploymentPath(String path) {
    if (!path?.trim()) {
        error("Deployment path cannot be empty")
    }
    
    if (!path.startsWith('/')) {
        error("Deployment path must be absolute")
    }
    
    if (path.contains('..') || path.contains('~')) {
        error("Deployment path contains potentially malicious patterns")
    }
    
    def dangerousPaths = ['/etc', '/bin', '/sbin', '/boot', '/sys', '/proc', '/dev']
    if (dangerousPaths.any { path.startsWith(it) }) {
        error("Deployment to system directories is not allowed")
    }
}

def validateServerAddress(String server) {
    if (!server?.trim()) {
        error("Server address cannot be empty")
    }
    
    if (server.contains(';') || server.contains('&') || server.contains('|') || 
        server.contains('`') || server.contains('$')) {
        error("Server address contains invalid characters")
    }
    
    if (!server.matches(/^[a-zA-Z0-9.-]+$/)) {
        error("Server address contains invalid characters: ${server}")
    }
}

def sanitizeURL(String url) {
    return url.trim().replaceAll(/[^\x20-\x7E]/, '')
}

def sanitizePath(String path) {
    return path.trim().replaceAll(/[^\x20-\x7E]/, '').replaceAll(/\/+/, '/')
}

def downloadArtifact(String url, String destination) {
    echo "Downloading from: ${url}"
    
    def curlCmd = """
        curl -f -L -S -s --max-time ${DOWNLOAD_TIMEOUT} \
             --max-filesize ${MAX_ARTIFACT_SIZE} \
             -o '${destination}' \
             '${url}'
    """
    
    def result = sh(script: curlCmd, returnStatus: true)
    
    if (result != 0) {
        error("Failed to download artifact from ${url}")
    }
    
    if (!fileExists(destination)) {
        error("Downloaded file does not exist: ${destination}")
    }
}

def calculateSHA256(String filePath) {
    def checksum = sh(
        script: "sha256sum '${filePath}' | awk '{print \$1}'",
        returnStdout: true
    ).trim().toLowerCase()
    
    return checksum
}

def deployToServer(String server, String deploymentPath) {
    echo "Deploying to server: ${server}"
    
    withCredentials([sshUserPrivateKey(
        credentialsId: 'deployment-ssh-key',
        keyFileVariable: 'SSH_KEY',
        usernameVariable: 'SSH_USER'
    )]) {
        def timestamp = new Date().format('yyyyMMdd-HHmmss')
        def backupPath = "${deploymentPath}.backup.${timestamp}"
        
        if (params.BACKUP_EXISTING) {
            sh """
                ssh -i '${SSH_KEY}' \
                    -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                    -o UserKnownHostsFile=/var/lib/jenkins/.ssh/known_hosts \
                    -o ConnectTimeout=30 \
                    ${SSH_USER}@${server} \
                    "if [ -e '${deploymentPath}' ]; then cp -r '${deploymentPath}' '${backupPath}'; fi"
            """
        }
        
        sh """
            ssh -i '${SSH_KEY}' \
                -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                -o UserKnownHostsFile=/var/lib/jenkins/.ssh/known_hosts \
                -o ConnectTimeout=30 \
                ${SSH_USER}@${server} \
                "mkdir -p '${deploymentPath}'"
        """
        
        sh """
            rsync -avz --delete \
                  -e "ssh -i '${SSH_KEY}' -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes -o UserKnownHostsFile=/var/lib/jenkins/.ssh/known_hosts" \
                  ${env.DEPLOYMENT_SOURCE}/ \
                  ${SSH_USER}@${server}:${deploymentPath}/
        """
        
        sh """
            ssh -i '${SSH_KEY}' \
                -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                -o UserKnownHostsFile=/var/lib/jenkins/.ssh/known_hosts \
                -o ConnectTimeout=30 \
                ${SSH_USER}@${server} \
                "find '${deploymentPath}' -type f -name '*.sh' -exec chmod +x {} \\;"
        """
    }
    
    echo "✓ Deployment to ${server} completed"
}

def verifyDeployment(String server, String deploymentPath) {
    echo "Verifying deployment on server: ${server}"
    
    withCredentials([sshUserPrivateKey(
        credentialsId: 'deployment-ssh-key',
        keyFileVariable: 'SSH_KEY',
        usernameVariable: 'SSH_USER'
    )]) {
        def pathExists = sh(
            script: """
                ssh -i '${SSH_KEY}' \
                    -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                    -o UserKnownHostsFile=/var/lib/jenkins/.ssh/known_hosts \
                    -o ConnectTimeout=30 \
                    ${SSH_USER}@${server} \
                    "test -e '${deploymentPath}' && echo 'exists' || echo 'missing'"
            """,
            returnStdout: true
        ).trim()
        
        if (pathExists != 'exists') {
            error("Deployment verification failed on ${server}: path does not exist")
        }
        
        def remoteChecksum = sh(
            script: """
                ssh -i '${SSH_KEY}' \
                    -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                    -o UserKnownHostsFile=/var/lib/jenkins/.ssh/known_hosts \
                    -o ConnectTimeout=30 \
                    ${SSH_USER}@${server} \
                    "find '${deploymentPath}' -type f -exec sha256sum {} \\; | sha256sum | awk '{print \\\$1}'"
            """,
            returnStdout: true
        ).trim()
        
        echo "Remote checksum: ${remoteChecksum}"
    }
    
    echo "✓ Verification on ${server} passed"
}

def performHealthCheck(String server) {
    echo "Performing health check on server: ${server}"
    
    withCredentials([sshUserPrivateKey(
        credentialsId: 'deployment-ssh-key',
        keyFileVariable: 'SSH_KEY',
        usernameVariable: 'SSH_USER'
    )]) {
        def healthStatus = sh(
            script: """
                ssh -i '${SSH_KEY}' \
                    -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                    -o UserKnownHostsFile=/var/lib/jenkins/.ssh/known_hosts \
                    -o ConnectTimeout=30 \
                    ${SSH_USER}@${server} \
                    "systemctl is-active application.service 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'"
            """,
            returnStdout: true
        ).trim()
        
        echo "Health status on ${server}: ${healthStatus}"
        
        if (healthStatus == 'failed') {
            error("Health check failed on ${server}")
        }
    }
    
    echo "✓ Health check on ${server} passed"
}
